segments.text: Hear me, Lord, and answer me, for I am poor and needy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Guard my life, for I am faithful to you; save your servant who trusts in you. You are my God;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: have mercy on me, Lord, for I call to you all day long.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Bring joy to your servant, Lord, for I put my trust in you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You, Lord, are forgiving and good, abounding in love to all who call to you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hear my prayer, Lord; listen to my cry for mercy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When I am in distress, I call to you, because you answer me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Among the gods there is none like you, Lord; no deeds can compare with yours.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the nations you have made will come and worship before you, Lord; they will bring glory to your name.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For you are great and do marvelous deeds; you alone are God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Teach me your way, Lord, that I may rely on your faithfulness; give me an undivided heart, that I may fear your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will praise you, Lord my God, with all my heart; I will glorify your name forever.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For great is your love toward me; you have delivered me from the depths, from the realm of the dead.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arrogant foes are attacking me, O God; ruthless people are trying to kill me— they have no regard for you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But you, Lord, are a compassionate and gracious God, slow to anger, abounding in love and faithfulness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Turn to me and have mercy on me; show your strength in behalf of your servant; save me, because I serve you just as my mother did.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Give me a sign of your goodness, that my enemies may see it and be put to shame, for you, Lord, have helped me and comforted me.
segments.speaker: David
